item.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley seriously injured in prison attack
item.description: The 52-year-old is serving a life sentence after being convicted of murdering schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman.

item.title: Number of young people out of work or education edges closer to one million
item.description: People at the start of their careers are particularly affected by the UK's weak job market.

item.title: Spain to check Gibraltar arrivals under post-Brexit deal
item.description: Travellers to the Rock will have to show their passport twice under a new UK-EU treaty.

item.title: Forty-day moor fire caused by 'cooking in forest'
item.description: The fire on Langdale Moor in North Yorkshire burned for around 40 days.

item.title: South Africa stay unbeaten with win over West Indies
item.description: Aiden Markram smacks 82 not out off 46 balls as South Africa beat West Indies by nine wickets to maintain their unbeaten record at the 2026 T20 World ...
